steps.title: Build the subject
steps.content: The blank forms the subject of found. The phrase US biologist Brad Gemmell identifies which biologist is meant, and and colleagues completes the compound subject.

steps.title: Apply appositive punctuation
steps.content: A and C wrongly set the essential name off with commas. D wrongly separates colleagues from the compound subject. No internal punctuation is needed because the name identifies the biologist rather than adding a removable aside. The answer is B.
